controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 09:18

descriptivenote.p: The materials are in French and English.

did.abstract: The collection consists of printed material relating to current political, economic, and social conditions in Cameroon. Also included are photographs.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the African Collection Curator.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cameroon Collection (MS 1507). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: African Collection (MS 605); Pamphlet Collection (MS 1351); African Postcard Collection (MS 1575). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The material in the original accession is arranged chronologically, with photographs last. Additions to the collection may vary in arrangement.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of printed material relating to current political, economic, and social conditions in Cameroon. Also included are photographs.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Political organizations: press releases; bulletins; journals; newsletters
Government journals; papers; documents; speeches; releases
Union des Populations du Cameroon (UPC): journals; documents; printed material
Mission de Délimitation 1912, 1913, 1914: Afrique Équatoriale Française Cameroun : picture book
"Kamerun: A Case Study in German Imperialism, 1884-1905," by Harry R. Rudin, [winner of the John Addison Porter Prize, Yale University]
Photographs [fifty-four; mainly French government information photographs of art, architecture, scenes of daily life]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The accession contains a variety of printed matter organized alphabetically by author, title, or organization.

did.unittitle: "Bebela," L'Union National des Étudiants Socialistes du Kamerun (UNESK)
Cahiers d'Education Civique, no. 4, Opposition en Démocratie, Cercle Culturel Camerounais
Cameroon Panorama , vol. 9, no. 153 [publication of the Catholic Dioceses in Cameroon]
Centre de Documentation, "Catalogue des Memoires 1977" [annotated bibliography]
"Courage," Union Chrétiennes de Jeunes Gens du Cameroun (UCJG), no. 2
La Gazette / The Gazette , vol. 1, no. 1 [newspaper]
Illustrated Manuel on Human Rights, no. 2, elections, Human Rights Defence Group
International Women's Club of Douala Newsletter, vol.1, no. 2
"Message to Southern Cameroonians at the Eleventh Hour," Cameroon Anglophone Movement (CAM)
"Nouvelles du Cameroun / Cameroon News" [press release of the Cameroon embassy in the U.S.]
Social Democratic Front (SDF), press briefing excerpts
"La Voix du Kamerun," Union des Populations du Cameroun (UPC), no. 32

title.part: Le Germoir (Journal des estudiantes du Centre Universitaire de Dschang)
Afo A Kom (Revue Camerounaise d'information artistique et culturelle)
Cameroun, dix ans de gouvernement Ahidjo
